title: JS EmitKinds Heft Options
description: Defines a configuration for emitting multiple formats of ECMAScript to separate folders.

emitKinds.description: An array of emit kinds that other plugins will use to determine where to write outputs.

outputFolder.title: Output Folder
outputFolder.description: The folder to output to, relative to the project root.

moduleKind.title: Module Kind
moduleKind.description: The module kind that files will conform to.

target.title: Target
target.description: The ECMAScript specification level that files will conform to.
